blended.narrative: Cascade Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 1,018 ft. Looking ahead, 22 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 11" of heavy snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 28°F, winds around 22 mph. Expect powder.
